backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a complaint management system with CRUD operations for complaints and officers, including status tracking, officer assignment, notification logging, and blob file attachment support.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two logo-related features (generating an app logo and displaying it in the navigation bar) to their associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router configuration with routes for dashboard, submit-complaint, complaint detail, and officers pages, all wrapped in a shared Layout with a Sonner toaster.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Persistent top navigation bar component displaying the app logo and brand name as a home link, desktop and mobile nav links with active state highlighting, and a footer.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state across the React app.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for complaints and officers, including listing, fetching, submitting, assigning, and adding via actor calls.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind layers, and defines light/dark theme CSS variables using OKLCH color values.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class merging, formatting complaint numbers and timestamps, and mapping complaint status to labels and Tailwind color classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/ComplaintDetail.tsx: Page component that displays full details of a single complaint, supports officer assignment, and allows downloading attached files.
frontend/src/pages/ComplaintsDashboard.t: Dashboard page that lists all complaints with status filter, summary stat cards, and links to individual complaint details and submission.
frontend/src/pages/OfficersManagement.ts: Page for registering new officers via a validated form and displaying the existing officers list in a table.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitComplaint.tsx: React page component that renders a complaint submission form with fields for applicant details, complaint description, and PDF/JPG file upload. On submission it calls the `useSubmitComplaint` mutation and displays the generated complaint number in a success alert.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that enables dark mode, sets up custom OKLCH-based color tokens (primary, secondary, nav, sidebar, chart, etc.), custom fonts, border radii, box shadows, and includes the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: JSON file tracking overall project state (version 5) for a Complaint Management App, listing the summary, architectural notes, known issues, image requirements, and all existing implemented features.
